title: Hello Biome
description: Highly customizable Pop-Up Text for biomes and dimensions.
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xDk3a5b0/images/bbaf68b1fcd80b4c9f41887fbee93ad6f1fc78ee.gif)

Whenever you go into another biome, the name of the biome pops up at the top of the screen.

Same for dimensions.



Beside that you can edit the text with the inbuilt **settings** screen that **can be opened with the H key** by default.

**So after you open this screen you can**

-switch between biome and dimension settings while clicking on the Biome or dimension button

-disable these texts whenever you want

-add a cooldown time between the texts

-base position

-text-align

-max opacity (opacity of the normal text, fade-in goes to this value, and fade-out starts from this value)

-enable the text shadow

-add biomes to a blacklist (just type river for example)

-size



also you can edit the fade-in, normal and fade-out texts

-duration (uses ticks, and 20 tick is 1 second)

-red, green, blue color (colors changes from fade-in to normal, then from normal to fade out)

-x, y move direction (direction changes from fade-in to normal, then from normal to fade out)



**Mod currently supports**

**Forge 26.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.1**

**Fabric 26.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.1**

**Neoforge 26.x | 1.21.x**



SEND ME A PRIVATE MESSAGE IF YOU NEED THE MOD IN A DIFFERENT VERSION OR IF YOU ENCOUNTER ANY BUGS AT CURSEFORGE

[https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects)
